---
title: "Isotypify"
subtitle: "Build your own isotype visualization"
execute:
  eval: true
  echo: false
  output: true
  warning: false
  error: true
  include: true
---

{{< include src/00_libs.qmd >}}
{{< include src/00_utils.qmd >}}
{{< include src/01_makeIsoline.qmd >}}

<style>
/* ── Layout ── */
.isotypify-layout-form,
.isotypify-rows-form {
  display: grid !important;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(240px, 1fr)) !important;
  gap: 8px 20px !important;
  align-items: end !important;
}
.isotypify-layout-form > *,
.isotypify-rows-form > * {
  width: 100% !important;
  min-width: 0 !important;
  box-sizing: border-box !important;
}
.isotypify-layout-form input,
.isotypify-rows-form input {
  width: 100% !important;
  max-width: 100% !important;
  box-sizing: border-box !important;
}
.isotypify-layout-form > form label,
.isotypify-rows-form > form label {
  white-space: nowrap;
}
.isotypify-layout-form label,
.isotypify-rows-form label,
.isotypify-layout-form output,
.isotypify-rows-form output,
.isotypify-layout-form input,
.isotypify-rows-form input,
.isotypify-layout-form input::placeholder,
.isotypify-rows-form input::placeholder,
.isotypify-layout-form select,
.isotypify-rows-form select,
.isotypify-layout-form textarea,
.isotypify-rows-form textarea {
  font-size: 14px !important;
}

/* ── Number inputs (paired with range) ── */
.isotypify-layout-form input[type="number"],
.isotypify-rows-form input[type="number"] {
  border: none !important;
  border-bottom: 1.5px solid #000 !important;
  border-radius: 0 !important;
  background: transparent !important;
  padding: 3px 0 !important;
  box-shadow: none !important;
  outline: none !important;
  -moz-appearance: textfield !important;
}
.isotypify-layout-form input[type="number"]::-webkit-inner-spin-button,
.isotypify-layout-form input[type="number"]::-webkit-outer-spin-button,
.isotypify-rows-form input[type="number"]::-webkit-inner-spin-button,
.isotypify-rows-form input[type="number"]::-webkit-outer-spin-button {
  -webkit-appearance: none;
  margin: 0;
}
.isotypify-layout-form input[type="number"]:focus,
.isotypify-rows-form input[type="number"]:focus {
  box-shadow: none !important;
  outline: none !important;
}

/* ── Text inputs ── */
.isotypify-layout-form input[type="text"],
.isotypify-rows-form input[type="text"] {
  border: none !important;
  border-bottom: 1.5px solid #000 !important;
  border-radius: 0 !important;
  background: transparent !important;
  padding: 3px 0 !important;
  box-shadow: none !important;
  outline: none !important;
}
.isotypify-layout-form input[type="text"]:focus,
.isotypify-rows-form input[type="text"]:focus {
  box-shadow: none !important;
  outline: none !important;
}

/* ── Range inputs ── */
.isotypify-layout-form input[type="range"],
.isotypify-rows-form input[type="range"] {
  -webkit-appearance: none;
  appearance: none;
  height: 3px !important;
  background: #e8e0d8 !important;
  border-radius: 2px !important;
  border: none !important;
  outline: none !important;
  cursor: pointer !important;
  accent-color: #198737;
  padding: 0 !important;
}
.isotypify-layout-form input[type="range"]::-webkit-slider-thumb,
.isotypify-rows-form input[type="range"]::-webkit-slider-thumb {
  -webkit-appearance: none;
  width: 13px;
  height: 13px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: #198737;
  cursor: pointer;
  border: none;
}
.isotypify-layout-form input[type="range"]::-moz-range-thumb,
.isotypify-rows-form input[type="range"]::-moz-range-thumb {
  width: 13px;
  height: 13px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: #198737;
  cursor: pointer;
  border: none;
}
.isotypify-layout-form input[type="range"]::-moz-range-track,
.isotypify-rows-form input[type="range"]::-moz-range-track {
  height: 3px;
  background: #e8e0d8;
  border-radius: 2px;
}

/* ── Color inputs ── */
.isotypify-layout-form input[type="color"],
.isotypify-rows-form input[type="color"] {
  -webkit-appearance: none;
  appearance: none;
  border: none !important;
  border-bottom: 1.5px solid #000 !important;
  border-radius: 0 !important;
  padding: 0 !important;
  width: 40px !important;
  height: 22px !important;
  cursor: pointer !important;
  background: transparent !important;
  box-shadow: none !important;
}
.isotypify-layout-form input[type="color"]::-webkit-color-swatch-wrapper,
.isotypify-rows-form input[type="color"]::-webkit-color-swatch-wrapper {
  padding: 0;
}
.isotypify-layout-form input[type="color"]::-webkit-color-swatch,
.isotypify-rows-form input[type="color"]::-webkit-color-swatch {
  border: none;
  border-radius: 0;
}
.isotypify-layout-form input[type="color"]::-moz-color-swatch,
.isotypify-rows-form input[type="color"]::-moz-color-swatch {
  border: none;
  border-radius: 0;
}

/* ── Checkboxes ── */
.isotypify-layout-form input[type="checkbox"],
.isotypify-rows-form input[type="checkbox"] {
  accent-color: #198737 !important;
  cursor: pointer !important;
}
</style>

---

### Layout

```{ojs}
viewof layoutOpts = {
  const defaultPersPerLine = width >= 1200 ? 50 : width >= 600 ? 25 : 10;
  const f = Inputs.form({
    numRows:     Inputs.range([1, 6],   { step: 1,  value: 2,                    label: "Number of rows" }),
    persPerLine: Inputs.range([5, 100], { step: 5,  value: defaultPersPerLine,   label: "Figures per row" }),
    cellWidth:    Inputs.range([10, 40],  { step: 1,  value: 18,  label: "Cell width (px)" }),
    cellHeight:   Inputs.range([60, 160], { step: 10, value: 100, label: "Cell height (px)" }),
    personHeight: Inputs.range([40, 160], { step: 5,  value: 100, label: "Glyph size (px)" }),
    randomOrder: Inputs.checkbox(["Random order"]),
    groupByKey:  Inputs.checkbox(["Collect heading"]),
  });
  f.classList.add("isotypify-layout-form");
  return f;
}
```

```{ojs}
//| classes: isotypify-rows
// All 4 row forms live here permanently so their values survive numRows changes.
// Visibility is managed by the cell below via DOM IDs.
viewof rowData = {
  const defaults = [
    { key: "Group A", pct: 75, subkey: "persons", hi: palette[0], lo: palette[5], shapes: "" },
    { key: "Group B", pct: 45, subkey: "persons", hi: palette[1], lo: palette[5], shapes: "" },
    { key: "Group C", pct: 60, subkey: "persons", hi: palette[2], lo: palette[5], shapes: "" },
    { key: "Group D", pct: 80, subkey: "persons", hi: palette[3], lo: palette[5], shapes: "" },
  ];

  const container = html`<div></div>`;
  const subForms = [];

  for (let i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
    const d = defaults[i];
    const form = Inputs.form({
      key:    Inputs.text({  label: "Label",           value: d.key,    width: 200 }),
      pct:    Inputs.range([0, 100], { label: "% highlighted", value: d.pct, step: 1 }),
      subkey: Inputs.text({  label: "Unit label",      value: d.subkey, width: 140 }),
      hi:     Inputs.color({ label: "Highlight color", value: d.hi }),
      lo:     Inputs.color({ label: "Background color",value: d.lo }),
      shapes: Inputs.text({  label: "Glyphs",          placeholder: "leave blank for default", width: 260 }),
    });
    form.classList.add("isotypify-rows-form");
    subForms.push(form);

    const section = document.createElement("div");
    section.id = `isotypify-row-${i}`;
    section.style.cssText = `margin-bottom: 24px; padding-bottom: 16px; display: ${i < 2 ? "" : "none"};`;

    const heading = document.createElement("h3");
    heading.textContent = `Row ${i + 1}`;
    heading.style.cssText = "margin: 0 0 8px 0;";
    section.appendChild(heading);
    section.appendChild(form);
    container.appendChild(section);
  }

  container.value = subForms.map(f => f.value);
  subForms.forEach(f => f.addEventListener("input", () => {
    container.value = subForms.map(f => f.value);
    container.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent("input"));
  }));

  return container;
}
```

```{ojs}
//| output: false
// Reactive visibility: show/hide row sections based on numRows.
// References rowData to guarantee this runs after the forms are rendered.
{
  rowData;
  for (let i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
    const el = document.getElementById(`isotypify-row-${i}`);
    if (el) el.style.display = i < layoutOpts.numRows ? "" : "none";
  }
}
```

---

```{ojs}
{
  const data = rowData.slice(0, layoutOpts.numRows).map(r => ({
    key:           r.key    || "–",
    value:         r.pct    / 100,
    subkey:        r.subkey || "persons",
    fillHighlight: r.hi,
    fillNormal:    r.lo,
    ...(r.shapes ? { shapes: r.shapes } : {})
  }));

  const viz = makeIsoline({
    data,
    persPerLineValue: layoutOpts.persPerLine,
    cellWidth:        layoutOpts.cellWidth,
    cellHeight:       layoutOpts.cellHeight,
    personHeight:     layoutOpts.personHeight,
    randomOrder:      layoutOpts.randomOrder.length > 0,
    groupByKey:       layoutOpts.groupByKey.length > 0
  });

  const container = html`<div id="isotypify-preview"></div>`;
  container.appendChild(viz);
  return container;
}
```

```{ojs}
{
  const btn = html`<button style="font-family: Jost, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 280; cursor: pointer; border: none; border-bottom: 1.5px solid #000; background: transparent; padding: 4px 0; margin-top: 4px;">⬇ Download PNG</button>`;

  btn.onclick = async () => {
    const preview = document.getElementById('isotypify-preview');
    if (!preview) return;
    btn.textContent = 'Generating…';
    btn.disabled = true;

    try {
      // Embed Isotype font as base64 so it renders in the exported canvas
      const buf = await fetch('style/Retro Isotype.ttf').then(r => r.arrayBuffer());
      let binary = '';
      const bytes = new Uint8Array(buf);
      for (let i = 0; i < bytes.length; i++) binary += String.fromCharCode(bytes[i]);
      const fontFace = `@font-face{font-family:'Isotype';src:url('data:font/truetype;base64,${btoa(binary)}')format('truetype')}`;

      // Walk each row div and collect SVG content + text labels
      const rowDivs = [...preview.querySelectorAll('div[style*="margin-bottom: 6px"]')];
      if (!rowDivs.length) return;

      const firstSvg = preview.querySelector('svg');
      const W = firstSvg ? +firstSvg.getAttribute('width') : 800;
      const pad = 16;
      const serializer = new XMLSerializer();
      let y = pad;
      const parts = [];

      for (const div of rowDivs) {
        const h3   = div.querySelector('h3');
        const span = div.querySelector('span');
        const svg  = div.querySelector('svg');

        if (h3) {
          parts.push(`<text x="${pad}" y="${y + 20}" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="18" font-weight="bold" fill="#000">${h3.textContent.trim()}</text>`);
          y += 32;
        }
        if (span) {
          const color = span.style.color || '#000';
          parts.push(`<text x="${pad}" y="${y + 16}" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="14" fill="${color}">${span.textContent.trim()}</text>`);
          y += 24;
        }
        if (svg) {
          const svgH = +svg.getAttribute('height');
          const inner = [...svg.children].map(c => serializer.serializeToString(c)).join('');
          parts.push(`<g transform="translate(0,${y})">${inner}</g>`);
          y += svgH + 6;
        }
      }

      const totalH = y + pad;
      const compositeSVG = `<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" width="${W}" height="${totalH}">
        <defs><style>${fontFace}</style></defs>
        <rect width="${W}" height="${totalH}" fill="white"/>
        ${parts.join('\n')}
      </svg>`;

      // Render to 2× canvas for retina quality
      const scale = 2;
      const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
      canvas.width  = W * scale;
      canvas.height = totalH * scale;
      const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
      ctx.scale(scale, scale);

      await new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
        const img  = new Image();
        const blob = new Blob([compositeSVG], { type: 'image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8' });
        const url  = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
        img.onload  = () => { ctx.drawImage(img, 0, 0); URL.revokeObjectURL(url); resolve(); };
        img.onerror = (e) => { URL.revokeObjectURL(url); reject(e); };
        img.src = url;
      });

      const a = document.createElement('a');
      a.download = 'isotypify.png';
      a.href = canvas.toDataURL('image/png');
      a.click();

    } catch(e) {
      console.error(e);
      alert('Export failed: ' + e.message);
    } finally {
      btn.textContent = '⬇ Download PNG';
      btn.disabled = false;
    }
  };

  return btn;
}
```

---

<p style="margin-top:12px">Isotype font by <a href="https://www.dafont.com/isotype.font" target="_blank">Ric Stephens</a>. Inspired by <a href="https://observablehq.com/@basilesimon/isotype-sketch-a-wee-people-bar-chart" target="_blank">Basile Simon</a>.</p>
